overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a dimly lit Gothic castle interior with stone corridors, ornate tapestries, and medieval architecture. The character moves through various connected halls and corridors, transitioning from a tapestry room to darker passages and a grand hall with house crests.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor approaching large wooden door

events.description: character opens large wooden door and enters the tapestry hall

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow stone corridor and opening a large wooden door to enter a larger hall

entered.detail: rough stone block walls of the narrow corridor
heavy wooden door with metal studs at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor with rough block walls, approaching a large studded wooden door. Warm torchlight illuminates the passage as the character opens the door to enter a larger space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with large narrative tapestries and stone pillars

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the tapestry hall, observing the large detailed wall hangings depicting various scenes

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting a woman in a yellow dress with unicorn
large tapestry showing a battle scene with horses and figures
thick stone support column with carved details
tall arched window with tracery patterns

segments.scene_description: The character explores a grand hall with high ceilings, walking past massive stone pillars and detailed wall tapestries depicting a woman in a yellow dress and battle scenes. The space is illuminated by warm wall sconces and ambient blue light from windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: tapestry hall exit area with stone benches

events.description: character approaches and opens wooden door leading to darker corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit of the tapestry hall and opening another wooden door to leave the room

entered.detail: second large wooden door serving as exit from the tapestry hall

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the far end of the tapestry hall, passing a stone bench and approaching a second large wooden door. The tapestries fall behind as the character opens the door to exit the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit stone corridor with knight statues and blue ambient light

events.description: entering darker corridor with blue ambient lighting and cooler atmosphere
character turns left toward a stone doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker stone corridor with blue ambient lighting, passing statues in alcoves

entered.detail: statue of a robed figure in a wall alcove
arched window with blue light filtering through

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker corridor illuminated by blue ambient light from gothic windows. The space features statues in alcoves and hanging chandeliers. The character walks past a stone statue and turns toward a doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with house crest and armor displays

events.description: descending stairs into grand hall with large H crest tapestry
encountering other student characters standing in the hall

agents.ego_description: walking down a staircase into a grand hall with a large H crest and suit of armor display, passing other students

entered.detail: wide stone staircase descending into the hall
large tapestry with letter H in center of ornate frame
full suit of medieval armor on display stand
stone railing along the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand staircase into a large hall featuring a prominent H crest tapestry and a suit of armor display. Other students are visible standing in the hall as the character moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with dragon skull and repeating gothic arches

events.description: entering room with large dragon skull mounted on the wall
entering long corridor with repeating stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking through corridors passing a large dragon skull display, then proceeding down a long arched hallway

entered.detail: large dragon skull mounted on stone pedestal against the wall
series of repeating gothic stone arches extending into the distance
metal chain barrier along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through connecting corridors, passing an impressive dragon skull display mounted on the wall. The journey continues into a long hallway with repeating gothic arches and chain barriers, illuminated by wall sconces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, torchlit passage into a grand tapestry hall and finally into a cold, atmospheric corridor. It begins in a tight stone corridor with rough block walls, moving forward until the character opens a studded wooden door to enter a vast space. As the environment expands, the camera glides through a grand hall with high ceilings and massive stone pillars, passing detailed tapestries of battle scenes and a woman in yellow under a mix of warm sconces and blue ambient light. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the hall, passing a stone bench before the character opens a second wooden door to exit the room. Finally, the lighting transitions from warmth to a deep blue glow as the camera enters a darker gothic corridor lined with statues in alcoves and hanging chandeliers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling grand hall into the depths of a secluded, atmospheric gothic corridor. It begins as the character descends a grand staircase into a large hall, passing other students and a prominent H crest tapestry beside a suit of armor. As the character moves forward, the open space narrows into connecting corridors where the camera glides past an impressive dragon skull mounted on the wall. The scene then shifts into a long, rhythmic hallway defined by repeating gothic arches and chain barriers, with the lighting transitioning to the dim, flickering glow of wall sconces.
